/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/gemma4_inference.dir/turboquant/gemma4_inference.cpp.o -o gemma4_inference  libturboquant_lib.a /tmp/mlx-source/build/libmlx.a -framework Metal -framework MetalKit -framework Foundation -framework Accelerate
